Petition To Join Uninsured Motorist Proceeding Against State Farm With The Instant Action At Law
Off Calendar Jul-06-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF CATHY MELOIR-BENOIT'S PETITION TO JOIN UNINSURED MOTORIST PROCEEDING AGAINST STATE FARM WITH THE INSTANT ACTION AT LAW.

APPEARANCES: Christian Einfeldt, Esq. of Albert G. Stoll, Jr. A Law Corporation 762-1383 for pltf & moving party; Michael J. Dodson, Esq. of Philip M. Andersen & Associates 925/225-6838 for deft/respondent & opposing party State Farm Mutual Automobile Insurance Co.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - THE PLAINTIFF'S PETITION TO JOIN UNINSURED MOTORIST PROCEEDINGS WITH THE INSTANT ACTION IS GRANTED. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
